posts.title: Phase 1 — Keywords & Search Terms
posts.text:
🔴 033 Amazon v1.1 — Phase 1: Keywords & Search Terms — Jul 15, 2026

DEGRADED MODE — Supermetrics B/C failed again (regression from Jul 14's one-day success; L-2026-07-09-001, contradiction #2 confirmed). Ad-spend inputs MISSING — bid and negative-keyword recommendations NOT STAGED; rank defense only.

Negative-keyword candidates: NOT STAGED — no keyword/search-term-level click data (Supermetrics B/C failed; browser unavailable in cloud environment).

Bid recommendations: NOT STAGED — degraded mode. Hard rule: never stage spend changes on rank data alone.

🔴 Slicker Brush (B0FQ628KCH, LIQUIDATION): 'slicker brush for dogs' dropped OFF RANKINGS entirely (was ~rank 100 Jul 13). Per hard rule: no bid/keyword/campaign rec. Spend-violation check CANNOT RUN today (Supermetrics failed). Standing violation from L-2026-07-14-001 remains open — no new spend authority requested. Zero optimization.

🟡 Rank Defense — Emergency Dematter (B0FQL56V99):
Per H10 Jul 13 report (latest available — no Jul 15 H10 refresh in data this run):
• 'detangler for dogs' (rank 12, −4 spots): HOLD — organic sliding; per L-2026-07-08-001, this keyword swings sharply in both directions; last known paid ROAS 1.83 (YELLOW, Jul 12 data) — not collapsing alongside organic
• 'dog detangler' (rank 13, −4 spots): HOLD — same rationale; paired volatile keyword
Hold current bid ceiling on both; no raises, no cuts. Campaign ID/ceiling unavailable (no browser connector).
@will — hold confirmed in Ad Console. No spend change requested.

TACOS guard: NOT STAGED — Supermetrics C failed; no fresh 7-day spend by ASIN.

Creative brief routing: Cannot evaluate — no CTR/ROAS data from Amazon Ads this run (Supermetrics A/B/C all failed).

AMAZON routine (STG 033 v1.1) · @will is sole approver · Ad-spend inputs MISSING — bid/negative recs NOT STAGED; rank defense only

posts.title: Solution — Dematter Rank Defense
posts.text:
💡 RECOMMENDATION: Hold current bid ceilings on the two campaigns targeting 'detangler for dogs' and 'dog detangler' — no raise, no cut — until organic ranks stabilize.
📊 WHY: Amazon Ads · 'detangler for dogs' rank 12 (−4), 'dog detangler' rank 13 (−4) · H10 Jul 13 data · Paid ROAS last confirmed 1.83 (YELLOW vs. 2.07 breakeven, Jul 12 Supermetrics) — not in kill band, organic sliding but not collapsing. L-2026-07-08-001 documents this keyword pair as high-volatility in both directions; cutting bids now risks ceding ground on the way back up.
⚡ ACTION: In Ad Console > Sponsored Products > search for campaigns containing 'detangler for dogs' and 'dog detangler' as keyword targets > confirm current bids are unchanged from yesterday. Do not adjust. Screenshot current bid values and reply here so this routine can track the ceiling.
⏱ DEADLINE: Jul 17, 2026 — cost of inaction: if bids are unknowingly elevated and organic slides further, TACOS worsens on a YELLOW-band SKU. Without Supermetrics data the exact $/day burned is unquantifiable, but each additional −4 rank day compounds the recovery cost.
👤 @will — reply 'approved' or 'revise'
Brief ID: 033_rec_dematter_rankdefense_2026-07-15
STATUS: OPEN

posts.title: Phase 2 — Listings
posts.text:
📋 033 Amazon v1.1 — Phase 2: Listings — Jul 15, 2026

Listing-score triage: NOT PERFORMED — H10 Listing Analyzer stale (last report: 2026-07-06, unchanged all week). No fresh scoring data available.

Review-driven fixes: NOT STAGED. Emergency Dematter 'ineffective' complaint theme: 2 confirmed instances with clear product attribution (Jun 19 2★, Jul 6 2★) — still below the 3+ threshold. Jun 24 1★ ('like glue,' product unattributed) excluded per attribution rule. No new reviews since Jul 9.

Compliance sweep: Listing text unavailable this run — compliance sweep not performed. Standing open item: B0FQ4PY573 compliance flag COMP-2026-07-14-001 (staged Jul 14 12:36 PM, routed to Anchor/#stg-creative-pipeline) — ~27h elapsed, reply still pending.

Inventory-driven flags:

🔴 STRANDED — FurFix De-Shed Brush (B0FQFP2S9F): 0 FBA units on hand · amazon_min not set · listing status: STRANDED. Originally flagged Jul 13 11:25 AM (~45h elapsed) — approaching 48h BLOCKED threshold (~3h remaining). Per L-2026-07-13-001. See approval sweep below.

🟡 EXCESS — 4-in-1 Shampoo (B0FQL16GH4): 4,055 on hand · 3,522 est. excess units · Jul 13 ordered sales: $17.99 (lowest active SKU by revenue). amazon_min: 66.

🟡 EXCESS — Pin Brush (B0FQDHXSZ5): 2,062 on hand · 1,870 est. excess units · Jul 13 ordered sales: $37.98. amazon_min: 127.

🟡 LOW STOCK below amazon_min — Rake Brush (B0FQF2VTMJ): 668 on hand vs. amazon_min 942 (below threshold) · 1,650 units inbound. Jul 13 ordered sales: $391.18 — highest-velocity non-Dematter SKU.

Hard rules held: Slicker Brush liquidation listing stands — no optimization. Product moments unblurred. Walmart: out of scope v1.1.

AMAZON routine (STG 033 v1.1) · @will is sole approver

posts.title: Solutions — Phase 2 Inventory Flags (4 items)
posts.text:
💡 RECOMMENDATION #1 — STRANDED (B0FQFP2S9F): Resolve the FurFix De-Shed Brush stranded listing in Seller Central today — and confirm whether this is an active product launch.
📊 WHY: Seller Central · B0FQFP2S9F on_hand: 0 · listing status: STRANDED · inventory_data.json Jul 15 · originally flagged Jul 13 11:25 AM (~45h elapsed, approaching 48h BLOCKED). L-2026-07-13-001.
⚡ ACTION: In Seller Central > Inventory > Fix Stranded Inventory > locate B0FQFP2S9F > follow the fix wizard. Confirm intentional launch — if yes, add to H10 tracked-SKU list and roas_bands.json same day.
⏱ DEADLINE: Jul 15, 2026 (today) — stranded listing prevents FBA sales. ~48h with no action from first flag.
Brief ID: 033_rec_B0FQFP2S9F_stranded_2026-07-15 · STATUS: OPEN (approaching BLOCKED)

💡 RECOMMENDATION #2 — EXCESS Shampoo (B0FQL16GH4): Check sessions, then decide whether to address with pricing or keyword coverage.
📊 WHY: 4,055 on hand · 3,522 est. excess units · $17.99 Jul 13 ordered sales · amazon_min 66.
⚡ ACTION: Seller Central > Business Reports > Detail Page Sales and Traffic > filter for B0FQL16GH4 > sessions Jul 8–14. If <20/day: review Ad Console keyword coverage and price vs. top 3 competitors.
⏱ DEADLINE: Jul 22, 2026 — excess units clear in 53+ weeks at current velocity, accruing monthly FBA storage fees.
Brief ID: 033_rec_shampoo_excess_2026-07-15 · STATUS: OPEN

💡 RECOMMENDATION #3 — EXCESS Pin Brush (B0FQDHXSZ5): Bundle session check with Shampoo pull — same report, two filters.
📊 WHY: 2,062 on hand · 1,870 est. excess units · $37.98 Jul 13 ordered sales · amazon_min 127.
⚡ ACTION: Seller Central > Business Reports > Detail Page Sales and Traffic > filter for B0FQDHXSZ5 > sessions Jul 8–14. If <30/day: review keyword coverage and price.
⏱ DEADLINE: Jul 22, 2026 — 1,870 excess units at current velocity = 49+ weeks to clear.
Brief ID: 033_rec_pinbrush_excess_2026-07-15 · STATUS: OPEN

💡 RECOMMENDATION #4 — LOW STOCK below amazon_min (B0FQF2VTMJ Rake Brush): Confirm inbound ETA — highest-velocity non-Dematter SKU is below Amazon's recommended minimum.
📊 WHY: 668 on hand vs. amazon_min 942 · 1,650 units inbound · $391.18 Jul 13 ordered sales · roas_bands.json: reorder decision pending with Graham.
⚡ ACTION: Seller Central > Shipments > find active Rake Brush inbound shipment > note expected receive date. If ETA >14 days, assess bridge order. Reply with receive date and inbound status.
⏱ DEADLINE: Jul 17, 2026 — below amazon_min now; delayed inbound risks stockout on the top brush SKU = rank loss more costly than a bridge order.
Brief ID: 033_rec_rakebrush_lowstock_2026-07-15 · STATUS: OPEN

posts.title: Approval Sweep — B0FQFP2S9F approaching BLOCKED
posts.text:
⚠️ STATUS: APPROACHING BLOCKED — 033 Amazon v1.1 Approval Sweep, Jul 15, 2026

B0FQFP2S9F (FurFix De-Shed Brush) structural ask first staged Jul 13 11:25 AM — ~45h elapsed with no reply from @will.

The 48h threshold is at approximately Jul 15 11:25 AM PT (~3h from now).

Cumulative cost of inaction since first flag:
• Stranded listing prevents any FBA sales on this SKU
• FBA storage fees accruing on any units in the system
• If intentional new-product launch: every day without H10/roas_bands.json tracking means ad spend runs without kill-band protection (per L-2026-07-08-003)

Action needed: Confirm intentional launch, resolve stranded status in Seller Central, add to tracking. See Phase 2 thread for full solution brief (Brief ID: 033_rec_B0FQFP2S9F_stranded_2026-07-15).

@will — reply here or in the Phase 2 thread.
033 Amazon v1.1 Approval Sweep

posts.text:

Approval sweep: 0 approved replies found on any prior 033 staged item; B0FQFP2S9F approaching BLOCKED re-tagged above; all others OPEN (COMP-2026-07-14-001 ~27h, 7 bundle ASINs ~28h, Slicker violation ~28h)
Ad-spend inputs MISSING — bid/negative recs NOT STAGED; rank defense only. Supermetrics B/C failed (L-2026-07-09-001, contradiction #2).
H10 Listing Analyzer stale (last 2026-07-06) — listing-score triage not performed; live listing text unavailable — compliance sweep not performed.
Note: v1.0 TEST MODE close-out posted at 08:09 AM today; this is the first v1.1 production run (TEST MODE removed, Insightful Solutions added, @will as sole approver).
